{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322085546C93D8EFF1C10C750F496"}"},"total":2243},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537170904076616472","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的真好，云南虫谷这一遍真的惊艳到我了，对于摸金我完全是个门外汉，在此之前，我从来没有看过鬼吹灯小说跟电影或者电视剧，作者写的我都去刷电影看看了。","text_exts":[{"e":48,"s":45,"text":"鬼吹灯","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AC%BC%E5%90%B9%E7%81%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774140946C750F496%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227537170904076616472%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227508284336018295832%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AC%BC%E5%90%B9%E7%81%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754890836,"group_id":"7508284336018295832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活在深渊里的人，但凡享受过黎明的一丝曙光，便一发不可收拾。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N27lwZf0eYClKnTTxXQnuE5aUYCTYxUttD4LuV0Qftwl","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/80d30473211a432d87d3d92c4f418e9d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708972&x-signature=xRU87A6IExp6iXgkIzPHF3mR5qk%3D","user_id":"2238247307057012","user_name":"衣崽崽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2238247307057012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1730705189,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508284336018295832","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运+设计迷宫+华夏古迹+全球直播】
       一年前，迷宫之神降临蓝星，随之而来的还有每周一个轮次的迷宫设计竞赛！
　　所有的科技和军事都被封锁，迷宫副本成为衡量一个国家强弱的唯一标准。
　　每个国家都需要设计出复杂而诡异的迷宫副本让其他国家进行挑战，获胜的国家国运昌盛，失败的国家天灾不断。
　　各国发现将本国历史上的古迹古墓设计成迷宫是获胜的捷径！希拉国设计出雅典神庙、埃沙国设计出胡夫金字塔、伊垃国设计出巴比伦王国。
　　可惜这个世界的大夏国出现了文化断层，丧失了遗迹传承，以至于在迷宫大赛中屡屡战败。
　　林叶穿越到这方世界，成为一个迷宫设计师，他发誓要让这个世界感受一下泱泱大国的底蕴！
　　精绝古城、虫谷献王墓、海底墓、西夏黑水城、昆仑山神宫、秦岭神树……
　　一个个精妙绝伦的迷宫被林叶设计出来。
　　每一个迷宫都让这个世界感受到华夏古墓的恐怖！
　　最后，林叶设计出了震惊世界的秦始皇陵！以一己之力，对抗整个世界！
　　千古一帝，龙魂再现，天地共鉴，仙魔鬼神共听之！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0678350e865dd8e847f1a1f519fbf590","author":"无戒僧","author_id":"","book_id":"7508284336018295832","book_name":"国运迷宫：代理华夏，掌千年陵寝","book_short_name":"华夏神墓","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":500,"name":"断层","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500&name=断层&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7508284492142887448","read_count":"88441","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1205807"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"504","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,直播,国运,断层","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/20c1d878e0b4a496bafe4c90852397ca~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324946&x-signature=Htj9yUATNhbWdr6iOu22Jyddro4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2054357178395595","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"216"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322085546C93D8EFF1C10C750F496"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":126,"forwarded_count":
